primary_prize: Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon

primary_sponsor.name: Arbitrum
primary_sponsor.primitive: Arbitrum Sepolia EVM contracts for refusal receipt proof
primary_sponsor.score_reason: Removing the Arbitrum contract path breaks the visible outcome: the user can still see a web receipt, but cannot connect the refusal to RefusalHub calldata, deployed addresses, or an explorer transaction.

core_user_action: The judge runs an unsafe RWA agent action and opens the saved refusal receipt.
visible_outcome: The screen shows a NO receipt with wallet identity, proof hashes, and Arbitrum Sepolia proof controls.
removal_breaks: If Arbitrum is removed, the product loses its chain-bound proof surface and becomes a web-only policy log. The reviewer can no longer verify the contract path or explorer record.
judge_sentence: Arbitrum Sepolia contracts -> refused RWA action becomes chain-bound receipt proof -> receipt detail plus explorer tx
